hardware.description: Supermicro A+ Server 8125GS - Standalone 8U GPU Server

model_variant_info.prefix_meaning: AS = A+ Server (standalone complete system with integrated chassis)
model_variant_info.suffix_meaning: Variants like -1-OI021 indicate custom configurations or customer-specific order codes
deployment_notes: Includes integrated power supplies, cooling, and management
Can be deployed independently without additional chassis
Easier to move, replace, or reconfigure compared to multi-node modules
Higher per-node cost but more flexible deployment

related_variants.difference: Custom configuration variant (OI021 suffix likely indicates Ori Industries order/config code)
Plug-in module variant for multi-node chassis (PIO = Plug-In, shares infrastructure)
Different GPU configuration (likely MI300/alternative GPU support)

comparison_table.flexibility: Higher - easier to move, replace, or reconfigure
comparison_table.cost_per_node: Higher - includes all infrastructure per unit

changes: Basic GPU support for NVIDIA HGX H100
known_issues: Uses older attribute naming scheme (e.g., SMTControl_0037 instead of SMTControl)
May require update for optimal GPU performance

research_notes.doc_discovery_method: Web search 'Supermicro AS-8125GS' + Supermicro product naming convention guide + Redfish system info
notes: AS prefix = A+ Server designation for AMD-based standalone systems
Model breakdown: 8=8U form factor, 1=2.5" drive type, 2=dual socket, 5=5th gen AMD EPYC 9004, GS=GPU platform
TNHR suffix indicates NVIDIA HGX configuration with specific cooling/power design
Custom suffixes like -1-OI021 typically indicate customer-specific configurations or order codes
OI021 suffix seen on systems from Ori Industries - likely their internal configuration identifier
Supports 8x NVIDIA H100 80GB or H200 141GB SXM GPUs with NVLink + NVSwitch
Different BIOS versions use different attribute naming (1.6 uses _XXXX suffixes, 3.7+ simplified)
Enable Above4GDecoding for addressing GPUs beyond 4GB boundary
Enable Re_SizeBARSupport (Resizable BAR) for modern GPUs (H100, H200)
Enable PCIe ARI for proper device enumeration with 8 GPUs
Disable IOMMU for bare-metal GPU workloads (enable only for virtualization)
System supports 8x GPUs with NVLink + NVSwitch for high-speed GPU-to-GPU communication
6x 3000W power supplies provide sufficient power for full GPU configuration

known_configurations.name: 8x H100 80GB (Ori Industries)
known_configurations.notes: Deployed at Ori Industries data centers. Uses older BIOS with _XXXX attribute naming. SMT typically disabled.

known_configurations.name: 8x H100 80GB (Updated BIOS)
known_configurations.notes: Updated BIOS with simplified attribute naming. Better GPU performance with Resizable BAR.
